name: log_trade
description: Log a trade with full context for self-learning analysis. Use this after every trade (win or loss) to build your trading history. Required fields: symbol, direction, entry, exit, pnl_percent, result. Optional: leverage, reason, indicators (JSON), market_context (JSON), notes. To view logged trades, use list_trades or show_stats instead.

pnl_percent.description: Profit/Loss percentage (positive for win, negative for loss)

indicators.description: JSON string with indicator values at entry (optional)

name: analyze
description: Analyze trading patterns to discover what works and what does not. Use this to get insights on win rates by direction, day of week, RSI ranges, leverage, and symbols. Outputs key insights with suggested rules. Run generate_rules to get actionable trading rules based on this analysis.

direction.description: Filter analysis by direction (LONG or SHORT)

name: generate_rules
description: Extract actionable trading rules from your trade history. Analyzes patterns and outputs rules like PREFER LONG on Mondays or AVOID high leverage. Rules are saved to learned_rules.json and used by update_memory. Run analyze first to understand patterns.

name: update_memory
description: Apply learned trading rules to your agent MEMORY.md file. Reads rules from learned_rules.json (generated by generate_rules) and appends a Learned Rules section. Use dry-run to preview changes before applying.

memory_path.description: Path to the MEMORY.md file to update

dry_run.description: Preview changes without writing to file
